title: Press & Media Kit | Phot.AI's Official Newsroom
title_zh: Phot.AI 官方新闻室 | 新闻与媒体资料包
full_text:
Press & Media Kit
Phot.AI in the News
Announcements, media coverage, and official updates from Phot.AI
Download Media Kit Contact Press
About Phot.AI
Creative intelligence, systemized
Phot.AI is an AI-powered creative automation platform that enables businesses, marketers, and creators to generate high-quality visuals instantly.
It combines image editing, generative AI, and workflow automation into a single unified platform — allowing users to create studio-quality visuals without design expertise. From product photography to ad creatives, Phot.AI powers the entire visual pipeline.
What We Do
A Creative OS for commerce
AngleLab Discover winning ad angles and creatives across platforms — before you spend
ListingLab Turn product data into conversion-ready listings with images, SEO, and copy
VideoLab Generate production-ready AI videos — UGC, product demos, and brand films
Creative Intelligence Test hundreds of variations, find winners automatically, and scale what works
Managed Services Dedicated pods for ads, listings, and video — your team, fully operated
In The News Press Releases
Latest announcements and media coverage from Phot.AI.
Latest January 2025
Creativeled Growth Startup Phot.AI raises $2.7 Million from Infoedge Ventures
New platform helps ecommerce brands optimize product listings and ads at scale.
Read full release December 2024 Phot.AI Raises Seed Funding to Scale Creative Intelligence Platform
Investment will accelerate product development and team growth.
Read more November 2024 Phot.AI Partners with Major Marketplaces
Strategic partnerships bring advanced creative optimization to more brands.
Read more
Company Highlights
The numbers that define us
4.5+
Rating
from 11,000+ users
Global
User Base
Rapidly growing worldwide
$2.7M
Seed Funding
Led by Info Edge Ventures
Multi-Industry
Adoption
Across verticals at scale
As Seen In
Media Coverage
Visual Content Startup Phot.AI Raises $2.7M from Info Edge Ventures
January 2025
Yenmo and Phot.AI Secure Fresh Funding to Expand AI Operations
January 2025
Phot.AI Featured on CNBC — AI-Powered Creative Platform
2024
Phot.AI Bags $2.7 Million in Seed Funding
January 2025
How Phot.AI Is Redefining Creative Automation for Growth Teams
2025
Meet the founders
Venus Dhuria
Co-Founder & CEO | Vision & Growth
" Scale isn't luck — it's a system. We built AppyHigh to 700M+ downloads by treating creative as infrastructure. "
Aneesh Rayancha
Co-Founder & CPO | Systems & Product
" Great products are built on great architecture. 15 years at Salesforce and Oracle taught me that scale starts with structure. "
Akshit Raja
Co-Founder & CAIO | AI & Intelligence
" The best creative decisions are data decisions. Generative AI doesn't replace intuition — it sharpens it. "
Product & Features
Full-stack creative infrastructure
AngleLab — Ad Performance Engine
Generate winning marketing angles from a prompt, URL, or product photo
Browse AI-generated hooks across Static, Carousel, and Video formats
Built-in Ad Success Scores for every creative
Parallel testing across platforms — Meta, Google, TikTok, LinkedIn
ListingLab — Listing Conversion Engine
Generate complete PDP listings from images or URLs
AI scoring against marketplace guidelines with issue flagging
One-click publish to Walmart, Shopify, Amazon, WooCommerce
Multilingual listing optimization at scale
VideoLab — AI Video Generation
Prompt-to-video: UGC ads, product demos, brand films
AI script writing with cinematic storyboard timelines
300+ hyper-realistic AI actors with lip-sync
Preset templates across proven ad categories
AI Studio — Creative Toolkit
Background removal, object editing, generative fill
Text-to-image generation for fast ideation
Studio-quality product photography with auto lighting
Managed Services — Operated Pods
Dedicated pods for Ads, Listings, and Video
1-week production cycles with specialist teams
Human expertise paired with native AI models
At a Glance
Key capabilities
AI-generated ad angles & hooks
Conversion-ready marketplace listings
Production-ready AI video in seconds
Multilingual creative at scale
Built-in Ad Success Scoring
Operated pods for ads, listings & video

About Phot.AI
Creative intelligence, systemized
Phot.AI is an AI-powered creative automation platform that enables businesses, marketers, and creators to generate high-quality visuals instantly.
